command: echo '=== vm-dashboard (.201) ===' && hostname && uname -r && df -h / | tail -1 | awk '{print $3"/"$2" ("$5" used)"}' && echo '--- Services ---' && systemctl list-units --state=active --no-pager --no-legend 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'docker|openclaw|hermes|homepage|uptime|nginx|wetty|immich' | head -8 && echo DONE_1894
